---
title: "random number"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# random number

```{julia}
using Distributions: Uniform
uniform_dist = Uniform(0, 10)  # 定义 [0,10] 的均匀分布
random_num = rand(uniform_dist)  # 单个随机数
random_vector = rand(uniform_dist, 3)  # 长度为 3 的向量
```
